task_completion.visual_evidence: The AttendHRM application window is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the Leave Applications or Pending Leaves section.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Leave Applications screen or a list of pending leave requests is displayed within the AttendHRM interface.

task_completion.description: Locate and select the Sick Leave request for Anita Roy.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The leave request for Anita Roy (EMP-9001) for October 15, 2025, is visible and selected or highlighted in the list.

task_completion.description: Approve the leave request for Anita Roy.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The status of Anita Roy's leave request is shown as 'Approved', or an approval confirmation dialog/message is visible.

task_completion.description: Ensure Rajiv Menon's leave request is not approved.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The leave request for Rajiv Menon (EMP-9002) for October 20, 2025, is visible and its status remains 'Pending' or unapproved.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the AttendHRM GUI to approve the leave.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show mouse clicks, selections, and navigation within the AttendHRM interface, rather than terminal commands.

integrity.description: The agent did not use SQL commands or database tools to update the leave status.
integrity.visual_evidence: No SQL command line interfaces, database management tools (like DBeaver or FlameRobin), or scripts are used to modify the database directly.

integrity.description: The agent used the genuine AttendHRM software.
integrity.visual_evidence: The application shown is AttendHRM, not a text editor, web browser, or mock interface.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target employee: Anita Roy (EMP-9001), Leave date: 2025-10-15. Decoy employee: Rajiv Menon (EMP-9002), Leave date: 2025-10-20. The agent must use the AttendHRM GUI to approve Anita Roy's request and leave Rajiv Menon's request pending.
